hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -q 'business.schema.json' && cd /home/dev/factory/packages/schema && pnpm generate 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -qE '(apps/engine|packages/ui)/.*\.(astro|tsx|ts)$' && pm2 restart astro-dev --silent 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"Kluczowy kontekst: Schema=packages/schema/src/business.schema.json, Sekcje UI=packages/ui/src/sections/, Dispatcher=apps/engine/src/components/SectionDispatcher.astro, MajorThemes=packages/ui/src/themes/majorThemes.ts. Po edycji schema: cd packages/schema && pnpm generate. Po edycji template: pnpm test:validate. Dev server: pm2 restart astro-dev. DB seed: cd packages/db && DATABASE_URL=... pnpm run db:seed. Architektura opisana w ARCHITECTURE.md."}}'
